final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, it is important to follow several preventive measures. These include avoiding crowded places and maintaining at least 1 metre distance from others [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016], wearing a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016], washing hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016], keeping indoor spaces well ventilated [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016], and getting vaccinated while continuing other preventive measures [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]. Additionally, staying up to date with COVID-19 vaccinations helps prevent serious illness and death [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].
